title: Intensely Rich Canadian Korean Pear Bake
description: A rich and gooey Canadian dish featuring Korean pear, perfect for a brunch mood, simmered to perfection in a mason jar, diabetic friendly.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together almond flour, unsweetened almond milk, large eggs, pure maple syrup, melted coconut oil, vanilla extract, and cinnamon powder.
Add sliced Korean pear to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Spoon the mixture into 4 mason jars, leaving about 1 inch of space at the top.
Place the mason jars in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides of the jars.
Cover the baking dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown.
Remove the mason jars from the water bath and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional sliced Korean pear if desired.
